name: ExtensionEvidenceVariable_Copyright
title: R5: Use and/or publishing restrictions (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `EvidenceVariable.copyright` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`EvidenceVariable.copyright` 0..1 `markdown`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `EvidenceVariable.copyright` 0..1 `markdown`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `EvidenceVariable.copyright` has a context of EvidenceVariable based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `EvidenceVariable`.
Element `EvidenceVariable.copyright` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `EvidenceVariable.copyright` has a context of EvidenceVariable based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `EvidenceVariable`.
Element `EvidenceVariable.copyright` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: A copyright statement relating to the resource and/or its contents. Copyright statements are generally legal restrictions on the use and publishing of the resource.
